changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/board/init.rs:68-135 (in worktree agent-a361f6ed)

`async fn register_merge_drivers(board_root: &Path) -> Result<(), io::Error>`

Happy paths well covered (7 tests). Missing:
- I/O error writing `.git/config` (e.g., read-only file) — should propagate as KanbanError::Io
- I/O error writing `.gitattributes`
- Board root with no parent (line 72 returns Ok(()))
- Pre-existing `.gitattributes` with other content — verify merge drivers are appended without disturbing existing entries #coverage-gap
Add tests for register_merge_drivers error path (init.rs)
